prestazioni: B58B30C (3.0L inline-6) forced induction upgrade via Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger with billet compressor wheel, 64mm inducer, and 76mm exducer, paired with a custom 4-inch V-band downpipe and TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegate for 650whp on E85 fuel with a Motec M150 ECU managing direct port injection and sequential ignition timing

Full Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilover suspension with 2-way adjustable dampers, 80mm front/70mm rear ride height adjustability, and spherical bearing top mounts for chassis rigidity, complemented by Cusco 25mm front and 22mm rear adjustable sway bars with pillow-ball end links

AP Racing 6-piston front (380mm) and 4-piston rear (355mm) big brake kit with R12 compound pads, stainless steel braided lines, and Motul RBF660 brake fluid, paired with a custom 4-way adjustable brake bias valve for track precision
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with carbon fiber front fenders, overfenders, and rear quarter panels, extending track width by 50mm front and 60mm rear, paired with a custom 3D-printed carbon fiber duckbill spoiler for 150kg of downforce at 200km/h

Seibon Carbon fiber hood with integrated NACA ducts for B58 intercooler and radiator cooling, featuring a matte clear coat with exposed weave finish and custom titanium hood pins from Radium Engineering

Custom 3-piece forged aluminum wheels from Work Meister S1 3P (19x10.5 +25 front, 19x12 +35 rear) with titanium hardware, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/19 front, 305/30/19 rear), powder-coated in BBS Gold with brushed titanium accents
